inputs.label: Waist Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Measured at the narrowest point of the torso, usually above the belly button.

inputs.label: Hip Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Measured at the widest point of the hips and buttocks.

inputs.label: Measurement Unit Code
inputs.businessContext: 1 for centimeters, 2 for inches. The ratio is unit-independent.

inputs.label: Gender Code
inputs.businessContext: 0 for female, 1 for male. Used for health risk threshold.
